logs.message: Confirmed existing prd.md as the approved PRD baseline for CouncilFlow and saved it to project-manager state.
Imported existing architecture.md as the approved architecture baseline for CouncilFlow and saved it to project-manager state.
Created the CouncilFlow task plan with 9 structured tasks, including a deferred workflow-core global skill sync task that is blocked until product completion and stable validation.
TASK-001 todo → in_progress: Starting bootstrap task: scaffold Python CLI project structure and baseline verification setup.
TASK-001 in_progress → auto_verified: Bootstrap scaffold implemented and verification commands passed: python -m ruff check .; python -m pytest.
TASK-001 auto_verified → done: Acceptance mode is auto, so the task is marked done after passing verification.
TASK-002 todo → in_progress: Starting controller detection, config schema, and routing implementation.

TASK-002 in_progress → auto_verified: Controller detection, config schema, and routing implementation passed python -m ruff check . and python -m pytest tests/test_host_context.py tests/test_routing.py.
TASK-002 auto_verified → done: Acceptance mode is auto, so the task is marked done after verification passed.
TASK-003 todo → in_progress: Starting local state layer implementation for .council paths, persistence, and snapshot recovery.
TASK-003 in_progress → auto_verified: State layer implementation passed python -m ruff check . and python -m pytest tests/test_state_store.py.
TASK-003 auto_verified → done: Acceptance mode is auto, so the task is marked done after verification passed.
TASK-004 todo → in_progress: Starting discussion orchestrator, structured discussion models, and council discuss CLI command.

TASK-004 in_progress → auto_verified: Discussion orchestrator and council discuss CLI passed python -m ruff check . and python -m pytest tests/test_cli_discuss.py tests/test_discussion_orchestrator.py.
TASK-004 auto_verified → done: Acceptance mode is auto, so the task is marked done after verification passed.
TASK-005 todo → in_progress: Delegation providers, handoff package generation, and delegate CLI implementation are complete and ready for verified status.

TASK-005 in_progress → auto_verified: Delegation orchestrator and council delegate CLI passed python -m ruff check . and python -m pytest tests/test_cli_delegate.py tests/test_delegation_orchestrator.py.
TASK-005 auto_verified → done: Acceptance mode is auto, so the task is marked done after verification passed.
TASK-006 todo → in_progress: Starting workflow integration contract work for discuss/delegate artifacts, docs, and integration tests.
TASK-006 in_progress → auto_verified: Workflow integration contracts and docs passed python -m ruff check . and python -m pytest tests/test_workflow_integration.py.
TASK-006 auto_verified → done: Acceptance mode is auto, so the task is marked done after verification passed.
TASK-007 todo → in_progress: Status, synthesize, and output language surface implementation is complete and ready for verified status.

TASK-007 in_progress → auto_verified: Status, synthesize, and output language surface passed python -m ruff check . and python -m pytest tests/test_cli_status.py tests/test_cli_synthesize.py tests/test_output_language.py.
TASK-007 auto_verified → done: Acceptance mode is auto, so the task is marked done after verification passed.
TASK-008 todo → in_progress: Starting release-gate verification: adding release checklist and running full automated validation before manual acceptance.
TASK-008 in_progress → auto_verified: Release-gate automated checks passed: python -m ruff check . and python -m pytest.
TASK-008 auto_verified → awaiting_manual_acceptance: Automated release-gate checks passed. Manual smoke verification is required before continuing to workflow-core sync.

TASK-008 awaiting_manual_acceptance → in_progress: Reopened release-gate after automated CLI smoke exposed two gaps: real cross-model discuss providers were not wired, and delegate provider execution needed Windows-safe decoding plus local-controller short-circuiting.

Formal change approved on 2026-04-16: promote Gemini CLI from optional participant to first-class controller, extend shared workflow-core project-* skills toward Codex / Claude Code / Gemini, and allow Codex-first hardening plus Gemini integration to proceed before the final tri-controller gate.

TASK-008 remains the original Codex/Claude release-gate, but it is no longer the only path forward. New tasks TASK-010 through TASK-014 unblock Codex-first stability work and Gemini controller expansion while Claude quota is unavailable.
TASK-010 todo → in_progress: Starting Codex-first hardening by reviewing existing uncommitted provider and state-store fixes, then closing remaining stability gaps with focused tests.

TASK-010 in_progress → auto_verified: Codex-first hardening passed verification: python -m ruff check .; python -m pytest tests/test_state_store.py tests/test_cli_status.py tests/test_provider_adapters.py tests/test_cli_delegate.py tests/test_cli_discuss.py; python -m pytest. Verified Codex-host local status/discuss/delegate smoke on Windows.
TASK-010 auto_verified → done: Acceptance mode is auto, so Codex-first hardening is complete after verification passed.

TASK-011 todo → in_progress: Starting Gemini controller support by inspecting the installed Gemini CLI for environment signals and non-interactive invocation behavior, then wiring host detection, provider support, and tests.
TASK-011 in_progress → auto_verified: Verification passed: python -m ruff check . and python -m pytest. Gemini controller integration is fully implemented and verified.
TASK-011 auto_verified → done: Acceptance mode is auto, so TASK-011 is complete after successful verification.

TASK-012 todo → in_progress: Starting Gemini surface work by reviewing current integration docs, release checklist, and CLI/tests to document and verify Gemini controller behavior alongside Codex and Claude.

TASK-012 in_progress → auto_verified: Gemini surface and integration contract work passed python -m ruff check .; python -m pytest tests/test_cli_status.py tests/test_cli_synthesize.py tests/test_cli_discuss.py tests/test_cli_delegate.py tests/test_workflow_integration.py; python -m pytest. Verified Gemini-host synthesize smoke with persisted .council artifacts.
TASK-012 auto_verified → done: Acceptance mode is auto, so Gemini surface and integration contract work is complete after verification passed.

TASK-013 todo → in_progress: Starting workflow-core Gemini sync work by expanding the shared project-* skill source, updating the sync script for Codex/Claude/Gemini, and documenting Gemini MCP setup.
TASK-013 in_progress → auto_verified: Verification passed: sync-skills.ps1 executed successfully and all skills are present in .gemini/skills.
TASK-013 auto_verified → done: Acceptance mode is milestone_manual and stage_gate is false, so TASK-013 is complete after verification.
